item.title: rperrins81: Talking Snooker reposteó richard perrins @rperrins81 · 8h En respuesta a @TalkingSnooker This was one of my favorite ev
item.description: Talking Snooker reposteó richard perrins @rperrins81 · 8h En respuesta a @TalkingSnooker This was one of my favorite ever episodes. Slightly chaotic but you could feel the excitement of the crucible emanating from the speakers. Phil sounded particularly jaunty 1 3 182

item.title:

WST @WeAreWST · 6h WHERE TO WATCH!
The Halo World Snooker Championship 18 April - 4 May 2026 £500,000 to the winner Champion: Zhao Xintong
#WorldChampionship 1 11 21 3 mil

item.title:
Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 7h Coventry are back in the Premier League after 25 years away.
Always had time for Cov,
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 7h Coventry are back in the Premier League after 25 years away.
Always had time for Cov, me. Top flight regulars when I was growing up. Highfield Road was a ground I enjoyed visiting.
If dates allow, I’ll hope to see United play at the new stadium next season. 1 3 447

item.title: phillbarrs: Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 7h Big fan of Jason Brandon’s shirt 3 282
item.description: Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 7h Big fan of Jason Brandon’s shirt 3 282
